prompt: We just added a new modality called 'Sound Bath' and a new center type 'coworking_space'. Can you verify everything is in sync across the codebase — the DB constraints, TypeScript types, UI lists, taxonomy, pipeline scripts? Don't fix anything, just tell me everywhere that needs updating.

assertions.name: identifies-all-modality-locations
assertions.description: Lists at least 5 of the 7 files where modalities are defined

assertions.name: identifies-all-center-type-locations
assertions.description: Lists at least 4 of the 5 files where center_types are defined

assertions.name: checks-taxonomy-table
assertions.description: Mentions taxonomy_terms table in Supabase as a location needing the new modality

assertions.name: checks-db-constraint
assertions.description: Mentions the CHECK constraint on centers.center_type as needing update

assertions.name: notes-sound-healing-exists
assertions.description: Recognizes that 'Sound Healing' already exists and 'Sound Bath' may be a synonym or separate modality
